doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: Real laws and case cited but appears to be a simplified summary rather than authentic Florida Department of State document with oversimplified characterization of Jones ruling.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 72
REASON: While Amendment 4, SB 7066, and Jones v. DeSantis are real, this appears to be a simplified summary rather than an authentic Florida Department of State official document, and the characterization of Jones v. DeSantis as "upholding" SB 7066 oversimplifies a complex ruling that actually struck down some provisions while allowing others.
